name: Shipwreck
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a skillet until crisp. Remove with paper towels to drain; crumble.
2. Drain drippings from the skillet.
3. Brown the ground beef; drain.
4. Add chopped onion and cook until tender (about 5 minutes).
5. Combine ketchup and brown sugar, then stir into the beef mixture.
6. Stir in pork and beans, adding all but 2 tablespoons of the crumbled bacon.
7. Transfer to an 8-inch square baking dish.
8. Top with the remaining bacon.
9. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
